name: scientifix-council
description: A 5-agent epistemic council with two modes. /scientifix evaluates ideas — same 5 personas (Adversarial, Data-Grounding, Red Team, Outside-the-Box, Steelman) produce a HOLDS/WEAK/DISCARD verdict. /scientifix-plan converts a sound idea into an actionable implementation plan with BUILD-FIRST/VERIFY-FIRST/SKIP per step, saved to .scientifix/plan_<ISO>.md. Your firewall against optimism bias in evaluation and your structured planner once the firewall clears.
